title: Bedrock Edition Panorama
description: Tired of how bland and common panoramas feel with each Minecraft update? Yeah, me too. Well, it's time to bring your game menu to a brand new level with this one!
body:
# Bring the uniqueness of Bedrock over to Java!
Tired of how bland and common panoramas feel with each Minecraft update? Yeah, me too.

Well, it's time to bring your game menu to a brand new level with this one!

![Bedrock Edition Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c74def8cdbc15f66dd64c2f841682431a0fc45bc.webp)

# Features
- Single panorama, directly ported from Bedrock promotional materials

# Not your cup of tea?
Feel free to check out [other panoramas](https://modrinth.com/user/Lumora) that I made for you!
